office_does: The assessor values taxable property, administers exemptions, and maintains assessment records.
race_blurb: Incumbent John A. Rosenau faces certified residential appraiser Chris Hollingsworth.

candidates.summary: Hollingsworth is a certified appraiser and business owner focused on training, professional standards, and consistent assessments.
highlights: Reports more than 20 years of appraisal experience [S1]
Supports training, appraisal standards, transparent communication, and consistent assessments [S1]

experience.basis: He has extensive appraisal expertise but no prior assessor-office record.

candidates.summary: Rosenau is the incumbent assessor and regional assessors' leader focused on valuation consistency, training, responsiveness, and exemptions.
highlights: Has served as assessor since 2021 and in regional and statewide assessor leadership [S1][S2]
Supports consistent valuations, training, taxpayer responsiveness, and expanded exemptions [S1]

experience.basis: Incumbency and professional-association leadership provide an established assessor record.
